entities.name: INDIAN PEANUT CLUMP VIRUS (IPCV-H)
entities.description: An isolate of the H serotype of a virus affecting peanuts.

entities.name: RNA-1
entities.description: The first RNA segment of the Indian peanut clump virus genome.

entities.name: NUCLEOTIDE SEQUENCE
entities.description: The specific order of nucleotides within the RNA-1 segment.

entities.name: OPEN READING FRAMES
entities.description: Regions of the RNA sequence that are translated into proteins.

entities.name: POLYPEPTIDES
entities.description: Protein products encoded by the open reading frames of the virus.

entities.name: METHYL TRANSFERASE
entities.description: An enzyme property found in the p30 polypeptide.

entities.name: NTP-BINDING PROPERTIES
entities.description: The ability to bind nucleoside triphosphates, found in the p30 and p90 polypeptides.

entities.name: RNA-DEPENDENT RNA POLYMERASES
entities.description: Enzymes that replicate RNA, found in the p90 polypeptide.

entities.name: PEANUT CLUMP VIRUS (PCV)
entities.description: A virus with a nucleotide sequence similar to IPCV.

entities.name: SOIL-BORNE WHEAT MOSAIC VIRUS
entities.description: A virus with translation products similar to those of IPCV.

entities.name: BARLEY STRIPE MOSAIC VIRUS
entities.description: A virus with translation products similar to those of IPCV.

entities.name: OLIGONUCLEOTIDE PRIMERS
entities.description: Short DNA sequences used for the amplification of viral RNAs.

entities.name: REVERSE TRANSCRIPTION-PCR AMPLIFICATION
entities.description: A technique used to amplify RNA sequences into DNA for analysis.

entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The host plant associated with the peanut clump virus.
